reviews: Great food, great service, great vibes. This place has become our family's favorite spot.
We had our anniversary dinner here and it was magical. The staff went above and beyond to make it special.
Best dining experience in the area. The atmosphere is perfect for date night and the menu never disappoints.
description: Biga - San Antonio Riverwalk Restaurant brings you a dining experience crafted with passion and the finest ingredients. From our kitchen to your table, every dish tells a story of flavor, tradition, and culinary artistry.
